title: Electricity transmission license exemption: Dogger Bank A offshore wind farm
body: " Update: 19 November 2025  We have published a summary of the responses.   We are seeking views on a proposed further time-limited exemption from the requirement to hold a transmission licence in respect of the offshore wind farm Dogger Bank A, owned and operated by Dogger Bank Offshore Wind Farm Project 1 Projco Limited.  Please send responses to essupport@energysecurity.gov.uk by midnight on 14 October 2025. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
